parameters.name: get_time
parameters.description: Get current date and time in a specific timezone. Parameter: timezone (IANA timezone like 'Europe/Berlin', 'America/New_York', or city name like 'Tokyo', 'London', or abbreviation like 'CET', 'EST')

value.timezone: ={{ $fromAI('timezone', 'Timezone: IANA format (Europe/Berlin), city name (Tokyo), or abbreviation (CET)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Timezone: IANA format (Europe/Berlin), city name (Tokyo), or abbreviation (CET)

parameters.name: convert_timezone
parameters.description: Convert a date/time from one timezone to another. Parameters: from_timezone (source timezone), to_timezone (target timezone), datetime (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

schema.description: Date and time to convert (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)
